name: Lavender Dream
short_description: A text-based visual game with a non-linear plot where every decision shapes the story. AI-driven characters engage in lifelike dialogues, each with unique motivations and hidden intentions you can uncover. The story’s outcome is in your hands.
detailed_description:
"Lavender Dream" is an experimental text visual novel with a non-linear plot that takes you to the year 2245, where corporations rule the world.

  • Over 6 Unique Characters: Each AI-controlled character has their own hidden motives and unique personality. Find an approach to each one, reveal secrets.

  • Free Dialogues: Communicate without restrictions, explore characters and create new storylines without pre-set lines.

  • Uses AI: Based on LLM to bring characters to life.

    Known Issues:
    Each character has a plot and manner of communication. Sometimes this leads to drawn-out dialogues and loops.

    Please note this before purchasing!

    The game requires a video card with at least 6-8 GB of video memory. This is necessary to run a large text model on your PC. If the video memory is less, the characters' response will be long. Up to 1 minute.
